title: GitHub - leandrobon/mutable-crm
excerpt: Contribute to leandrobon/mutable-crm development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
A CRM whose schema you change by talking to it.

You write "contacts need a company field". The model proposes a structured change, you review it, you apply it, and the table re-renders itself from the live database schema. There is no hand-written UI per entity, and no code is generated or deployed. Ask for something broader ("a CRM to keep track of my farm") and the whole set of tables arrives as one proposal.

The interesting part

The model is never asked for SQL. It gets four typed tools (createTables, addColumn, renameColumn, changeColumnType) and the current schema as context, and picks a tool and its arguments. The application generates the SQL. So:

  • It cannot hallucinate SQL syntax, because it never writes SQL.
  • It cannot ask for a DROP we didn't implement, because there is no drop tool to express the request with. Safety lives in the tool vocabulary, not in a prompt asking the model to behave.
  • The plain-language summary can't lie: it is derived from the same arguments the SQL is generated from, not from a second model call.

The model never sees your data. formatSchemaForPrompt() sends table and column names and types only, so no value stored in the CRM reaches the model's context.

Two rules the code holds to:

  1. The model executes nothing. It proposes. Applying is always a user click, in a separate server action.
  2. Every migration is stored with its reverse. up_sql and down_sql are generated together or the migration does not exist.

Validation happens twice: strict: true makes the API guarantee the arguments match the tool's schema, then planMigration() checks them against the live database (does the table exist, is the column name taken, is the new type different, would a NOT NULL column break existing rows) which the API cannot know.

Undo

Every applied change is listed in a History tab and reversed with the down_sql it was stored with. Undo is last-in-first-out: only the newest change still in effect can be undone, because reverting migration N while N+1 builds on it would fail halfway or leave the schema somewhere neither migration describes. The eligibility check runs inside the transaction, so a stale page or two tabs racing cannot slip past it.

Undo restores the shape of the schema, never the values: undoing an added column drops everything written into it, so those undos are marked destructive and take a second click. A reverse that no longer fits the data fails loudly rather than destroying it. Change a numeric column to text, write "n/a" into it, then undo:

The database refused the undo, so nothing was changed:
invalid input syntax for type numeric: "n/a"

Running it

You need Docker and Node 20+.

cp .env.example .env.local   # then paste your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
npm install
npm run db:up                # postgres on localhost:5433
npm run db:init              # create the _meta schema
npm run dev

Open http://localhost:3000. The database starts empty, so the first thing you do is ask for some tables.

Tests

Three suites run against a real Postgres with no API calls and no credits spent. Each creates its own table, seeds it with rows, and drops it afterwards. They run against populated tables on purpose: an ALTER TYPE on an empty table proves nothing.

npm test                  # all three, stopping at the first failure
npm run test:migrations   # or one at a time
npm run test:rows
npm run test:undo

test-migrations.ts round-trips every operation and checks the schema comes back byte-identical to where it started. test-undo.ts covers out-of-order undo refused before any SQL runs, a reverse that no longer fits the data, and undoing something already undone. A fourth, npm run test:e2e, runs the real model and costs API credits; it is deliberately left out of npm test.

Stack

Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Postgres in Docker, Drizzle, the Anthropic SDK, shadcn/ui. No LangChain, deliberately.

Drizzle is the query and execution layer, not the migration layer: user tables are created at runtime, so no TypeScript schema file describes them and drizzle-kit cannot diff them. Introspection reads information_schema and pg_catalog directly, so a type it did not create is not silently flattened.

Voice input is dictation only, via the browser's Web Speech API. The transcript fills the textarea and you still press Send.

Scope

Four schema operations: create tables, add column, rename column, change column type. Plus undo, and editing rows in the CRM view.

There is no drop, for either a table or a column: deletion is absent from the vocabulary rather than disabled behind a check.

There are no relationships. When one entity refers to another the model uses a plain integer column (animal_id) and says in its reply that nothing enforces it. The schema can imply relationships that it does not enforce.

Out of scope: authentication, multi-tenant, permissions, RLS, production deployment, importing from other CRMs. It is single-user and local.

Architecture

docs/ARCHITECTURE.md documents every directory and file and why each exists, including why transactions must run on a single checked-out connection, and why the migration file is written after the commit.

License

MIT, see LICENSE.

blocks.html_en: A CRM whose schema you change by talking to it.

sentences.en: A CRM whose schema you change by talking to it.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过与其交谈来更改其架构的 CRM。

blocks.html_en: You write "contacts need a company field". The model proposes a structured change, you review it, you apply it, and the table re-renders itself from the live database schema. There is no hand-written UI per entity, and no code is generated or deployed. Ask for something broader ("a CRM to keep track of my farm") and the whole set of tables arrives as one proposal.

sentences.en: You write "contacts need a company field".
sentences.zh: 您写“联系人需要公司字段”。

sentences.en: The model proposes a structured change, you review it, you apply it, and the table re-renders itself from the live database schema.
sentences.zh: 该模型提出了结构化更改，您检查它，应用它，然后表根据实时数据库模式重新呈现自身。

sentences.en: There is no hand-written UI per entity, and no code is generated or deployed.
sentences.zh: 每个实体没有手写的 UI，也没有生成或部署代码。

sentences.en: Ask for something broader ("a CRM to keep track of my farm") and the whole set of tables arrives as one proposal.
sentences.zh: 要求更广泛的东西（“跟踪我的农场的 CRM”），整套表格会作为一个提案到达。

blocks.html_en: The interesting part

sentences.en: The interesting part
sentences.zh: 有趣的部分

blocks.html_en: The model is never asked for SQL. It gets four typed tools (createTables, addColumn, renameColumn, changeColumnType) and the current schema as context, and picks a tool and its arguments. The application generates the SQL. So:

sentences.en: The model is never asked for SQL.
sentences.zh: 该模型从不要求 SQL。

sentences.en: It gets four typed tools (createTables, addColumn, renameColumn, changeColumnType) and the current schema as context, and picks a tool and its arguments.
sentences.zh: 它获取四个类型化工具（createTables、addColumn、renameColumn、changeColumnType）和当前架构作为上下文，并选择一个工具及其参数。

sentences.en: The application generates the SQL.
sentences.zh: 应用程序生成 SQL。

sentences.en: So:
sentences.zh: 所以：

blocks.html_en: • It cannot hallucinate SQL syntax, because it never writes SQL.

sentences.en: It cannot hallucinate SQL syntax, because it never writes SQL.
sentences.zh: 它无法幻化 SQL 语法，因为它从不编写 SQL。

blocks.html_en: • It cannot ask for a DROP we didn't implement, because there is no drop tool to express the request with. Safety lives in the tool vocabulary, not in a prompt asking the model to behave.

sentences.en: It cannot ask for a DROP we didn't implement, because there is no drop tool to express the request with.
sentences.zh: 它不能请求我们未实现的 DROP，因为没有用于表达请求的 drop 工具。

sentences.en: Safety lives in the tool vocabulary, not in a prompt asking the model to behave.
sentences.zh: 安全存在于工具词汇中，而不是要求模型行为的提示中。

blocks.html_en: • The plain-language summary can't lie: it is derived from the same arguments the SQL is generated from, not from a second model call.

sentences.en: The plain-language summary can't lie: it is derived from the same arguments the SQL is generated from, not from a second model call.
sentences.zh: 简单语言的摘要不会说谎：它源自生成 SQL 的相同参数，而不是源自第二个模型调用。

blocks.html_en: The model never sees your data. formatSchemaForPrompt() sends table and column names and types only, so no value stored in the CRM reaches the model's context.

sentences.en: The model never sees your data.
sentences.zh: 该模型永远不会看到您的数据。

sentences.en: formatSchemaForPrompt() sends table and column names and types only, so no value stored in the CRM reaches the model's context.
sentences.zh: formatSchemaForPrompt() 仅发送表和列的名称和类型，因此 CRM 中存储的值不会到达模型的上下文。

blocks.html_en: Two rules the code holds to:

sentences.en: Two rules the code holds to:
sentences.zh: 该代码遵循两条规则：

blocks.html_en: • The model executes nothing. It proposes. Applying is always a user click, in a separate server action.

sentences.en: The model executes nothing.
sentences.zh: 该模型不执行任何操作。

sentences.en: It proposes.
sentences.zh: 它建议。

sentences.en: Applying is always a user click, in a separate server action.
sentences.zh: 应用始终是用户在单独的服务器操作中单击。

blocks.html_en: • Every migration is stored with its reverse. up_sql and down_sql are generated together or the migration does not exist.

sentences.en: Every migration is stored with its reverse.
sentences.zh: 每次迁移都与其相反的迁移一起存储。

sentences.en: up_sql and down_sql are generated together or the migration does not exist.
sentences.zh: up_sql和down_sql一起生成或者迁移不存在。

blocks.html_en: Validation happens twice: strict: true makes the API guarantee the arguments match the tool's schema, then planMigration() checks them against the live database (does the table exist, is the column name taken, is the new type different, would a NOT NULL column break existing rows) which the API cannot know.

sentences.en: Validation happens twice: strict: true makes the API guarantee the arguments match the tool's schema, then planMigration() checks them against the live database (does the table exist, is the column name taken, is the new type different, would a NOT NULL column break existing rows) which the API cannot know.
sentences.zh: 验证发生两次： strict: true 使 API 保证参数与工具的架构匹配，然后 planMigration() 根据实时数据库检查它们（表是否存在、列名是否采用、新类型是否不同、NOT NULL 列是否会中断现有行），而 API 无法知道这些参数。

blocks.html_en: Undo

Every applied change is listed in a History tab and reversed with the down_sql it was stored with. Undo is last-in-first-out: only the newest change still in effect can be undone, because reverting migration N while N+1 builds on it would fail halfway or leave the schema somewhere neither migration describes. The eligibility check runs inside the transaction, so a stale page or two tabs racing cannot slip past it.

sentences.en: Every applied change is listed in a History tab and reversed with the down_sql it was stored with.
sentences.zh: 每个应用的更改都会在“历史记录”选项卡中列出，并与存储它的 down_sql 反转。

sentences.en: Undo is last-in-first-out: only the newest change still in effect can be undone, because reverting migration N while N+1 builds on it would fail halfway or leave the schema somewhere neither migration describes.
sentences.zh: 撤消是后进先出：只有仍然有效的最新更改才能撤消，因为在 N+1 的基础上构建 N+1 时恢复迁移 N 会中途失败，或者将架构留在迁移都未描述的地方。

sentences.en: The eligibility check runs inside the transaction, so a stale page or two tabs racing cannot slip past it.
sentences.zh: 资格检查在事务内部运行，因此陈旧的页面或两个选项卡竞争无法跳过它。

blocks.html_en: Undo restores the shape of the schema, never the values: undoing an added column drops everything written into it, so those undos are marked destructive and take a second click. A reverse that no longer fits the data fails loudly rather than destroying it. Change a numeric column to text, write "n/a" into it, then undo:

sentences.en: Undo restores the shape of the schema, never the values: undoing an added column drops everything written into it, so those undos are marked destructive and take a second click.
sentences.zh: 撤消会恢复模式的形状，而不是恢复值：撤消添加的列会删除写入其中的所有内容，因此这些撤消被标记为破坏性的，并需要再次单击。

sentences.en: A reverse that no longer fits the data fails loudly rather than destroying it.
sentences.zh: 不再适合数据的逆向失败而不是破坏它。

sentences.en: Change a numeric column to text, write "n/a" into it, then undo:
sentences.zh: 将数字列更改为文本，在其中写入“n/a”，然后撤消：

blocks.html_en: Running it

sentences.en: Running it
sentences.zh: 运行它

blocks.html_en: You need Docker and Node 20+.

sentences.en: You need Docker and Node 20+.
sentences.zh: 您需要 Docker 和 Node 20+。

blocks.html_en: Open http://localhost:3000. The database starts empty, so the first thing you do is ask for some tables.

sentences.en: Open http://localhost:3000. The database starts empty, so the first thing you do is ask for some tables.
sentences.zh: 打开http://localhost:3000。数据库一开始是空的，所以您要做的第一件事就是请求一些表。

blocks.html_en: Tests

Three suites run against a real Postgres with no API calls and no credits spent. Each creates its own table, seeds it with rows, and drops it afterwards. They run against populated tables on purpose: an ALTER TYPE on an empty table proves nothing.

sentences.en: Three suites run against a real Postgres with no API calls and no credits spent.
sentences.zh: 三个套件针对真正的 Postgres 运行，没有 API 调用，也没有花费任何积分。

sentences.en: Each creates its own table, seeds it with rows, and drops it afterwards.
sentences.zh: 每个表都创建自己的表，为其添加行种子，然后将其删除。

sentences.en: They run against populated tables on purpose: an ALTER TYPE on an empty table proves nothing.
sentences.zh: 它们故意针对已填充的表运行：空表上的 ALTER TYPE 不能证明任何事情。

blocks.html_en: test-migrations.ts round-trips every operation and checks the schema comes back byte-identical to where it started. test-undo.ts covers out-of-order undo refused before any SQL runs, a reverse that no longer fits the data, and undoing something already undone. A fourth, npm run test:e2e, runs the real model and costs API credits; it is deliberately left out of npm test.

sentences.en: test-migrations.ts round-trips every operation and checks the schema comes back byte-identical to where it started.
sentences.zh: test-migrations.ts 往返每个操作并检查架构返回的字节与其开始位置相同。

sentences.en: test-undo.ts covers out-of-order undo refused before any SQL runs, a reverse that no longer fits the data, and undoing something already undone.
sentences.zh: test-undo.ts 涵盖了在任何 SQL 运行之前拒绝的无序撤消、不再适合数据的反向操作以及撤消已撤消的操作。

sentences.en: A fourth, npm run test:e2e, runs the real model and costs API credits; it is deliberately left out of npm test.
sentences.zh: 第四个，npm run test:e2e，运行真实模型并消耗 API 积分；它被故意排除在 npm 测试之外。

blocks.html_en: Stack
Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Postgres in Docker, Drizzle, the Anthropic SDK, shadcn/ui. No LangChain, deliberately.

sentences.en: Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Postgres in Docker, Drizzle, the Anthropic SDK, shadcn/ui.
sentences.zh: Next.js 16（应用程序路由器）、TypeScript、Docker 中的 Postgres、Drizzle、Anthropic SDK、shadcn/ui。

sentences.en: No LangChain, deliberately.
sentences.zh: 没有浪链，故意的。

blocks.html_en: Drizzle is the query and execution layer, not the migration layer: user tables are created at runtime, so no TypeScript schema file describes them and drizzle-kit cannot diff them. Introspection reads information_schema and pg_catalog directly, so a type it did not create is not silently flattened.

sentences.en: Drizzle is the query and execution layer, not the migration layer: user tables are created at runtime, so no TypeScript schema file describes them and drizzle-kit cannot diff them.
sentences.zh: Drizzle 是查询和执行层，而不是迁移层：用户表是在运行时创建的，因此没有 TypeScript 模式文件描述它们，并且 drizzle-kit 无法区分它们。

sentences.en: Introspection reads information_schema and pg_catalog directly, so a type it did not create is not silently flattened.
sentences.zh: Introspection 直接读取 information_schema 和 pg_catalog，因此它没有创建的类型不会被静默扁平化。

blocks.html_en: Voice input is dictation only, via the browser's Web Speech API. The transcript fills the textarea and you still press Send.

sentences.en: Voice input is dictation only, via the browser's Web Speech API.
sentences.zh: 语音输入仅是通过浏览器的 Web Speech API 进行的听写。

sentences.en: The transcript fills the textarea and you still press Send.
sentences.zh: 文字记录填满文本区域，您仍然按“发送”。

blocks.html_en: Scope
Four schema operations: create tables, add column, rename column, change column type. Plus undo, and editing rows in the CRM view.

sentences.en: Four schema operations: create tables, add column, rename column, change column type.
sentences.zh: 四种模式操作：创建表、添加列、重命名列、更改列类型。

sentences.en: Plus undo, and editing rows in the CRM view.
sentences.zh: 以及在 CRM 视图中撤消和编辑行。

blocks.html_en: There is no drop, for either a table or a column: deletion is absent from the vocabulary rather than disabled behind a check.

sentences.en: There is no drop, for either a table or a column: deletion is absent from the vocabulary rather than disabled behind a check.
sentences.zh: 对于表或列，没有删除：词汇表中不存在删除，而不是在检查后禁用。

blocks.html_en: There are no relationships. When one entity refers to another the model uses a plain integer column (animal_id) and says in its reply that nothing enforces it. The schema can imply relationships that it does not enforce.

sentences.en: There are no relationships.
sentences.zh: 没有关系。

sentences.en: When one entity refers to another the model uses a plain integer column (animal_id) and says in its reply that nothing enforces it.
sentences.zh: 当一个实体引用另一个实体时，模型使用普通整数列（animal_id），并在回复中表示没有任何强制执行。

sentences.en: The schema can imply relationships that it does not enforce.
sentences.zh: 该模式可以暗示它不强制执行的关系。

blocks.html_en: Out of scope: authentication, multi-tenant, permissions, RLS, production deployment, importing from other CRMs. It is single-user and local.

sentences.en: Out of scope: authentication, multi-tenant, permissions, RLS, production deployment, importing from other CRMs.
sentences.zh: 超出范围：身份验证、多租户、权限、RLS、生产部署、从其他 CRM 导入。

sentences.en: It is single-user and local.
sentences.zh: 它是单用户且本地的。

blocks.html_en: Architecture

sentences.en: Architecture
sentences.zh: 建筑学

blocks.html_en: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md documents every directory and file and why each exists, including why transactions must run on a single checked-out connection, and why the migration file is written after the commit.

sentences.en: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md documents every directory and file and why each exists, including why transactions must run on a single checked-out connection, and why the migration file is written after the commit.
sentences.zh: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 记录每个目录和文件以及每个目录和文件存在的原因，包括为什么事务必须在单个签出连接上运行，以及为什么在提交后写入迁移文件。

blocks.html_en: License

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: MIT, see LICENSE.

sentences.en: MIT, see LICENSE.
sentences.zh: 麻省理工学院，请参阅许可证。

content_html_zh:
您可以通过与其交谈来更改其架构的 CRM。

您写“联系人需要公司字段”。 该模型提出了结构化更改，您检查它，应用它，然后表根据实时数据库模式重新呈现自身。 每个实体没有手写的 UI，也没有生成或部署代码。 要求更广泛的东西（“跟踪我的农场的 CRM”），整套表格会作为一个提案到达。

有趣的部分

该模型从不要求 SQL。 它获取四个类型化工具（createTables、addColumn、renameColumn、changeColumnType）和当前架构作为上下文，并选择一个工具及其参数。 应用程序生成 SQL。 所以：

  • 它无法幻化 SQL 语法，因为它从不编写 SQL。
  • 它不能请求我们未实现的 DROP，因为没有用于表达请求的 drop 工具。 安全存在于工具词汇中，而不是要求模型行为的提示中。
  • 简单语言的摘要不会说谎：它源自生成 SQL 的相同参数，而不是源自第二个模型调用。

该模型永远不会看到您的数据。 formatSchemaForPrompt() 仅发送表和列的名称和类型，因此 CRM 中存储的值不会到达模型的上下文。

该代码遵循两条规则：

  1. 该模型不执行任何操作。 它建议。 应用始终是用户在单独的服务器操作中单击。
  2. 每次迁移都与其相反的迁移一起存储。 up_sql和down_sql一起生成或者迁移不存在。

验证发生两次： strict: true 使 API 保证参数与工具的架构匹配，然后 planMigration() 根据实时数据库检查它们（表是否存在、列名是否采用、新类型是否不同、NOT NULL 列是否会中断现有行），而 API 无法知道这些参数。

Undo

每个应用的更改都会在“历史记录”选项卡中列出，并与存储它的 down_sql 反转。 撤消是后进先出：只有仍然有效的最新更改才能撤消，因为在 N+1 的基础上构建 N+1 时恢复迁移 N 会中途失败，或者将架构留在迁移都未描述的地方。 资格检查在事务内部运行，因此陈旧的页面或两个选项卡竞争无法跳过它。

撤消会恢复模式的形状，而不是恢复值：撤消添加的列会删除写入其中的所有内容，因此这些撤消被标记为破坏性的，并需要再次单击。 不再适合数据的逆向失败而不是破坏它。 将数字列更改为文本，在其中写入“n/a”，然后撤消：

The database refused the undo, so nothing was changed:
invalid input syntax for type numeric: "n/a"

运行它

您需要 Docker 和 Node 20+。

cp .env.example .env.local   # then paste your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
npm install
npm run db:up                # postgres on localhost:5433
npm run db:init              # create the _meta schema
npm run dev

打开http://localhost:3000。数据库一开始是空的，所以您要做的第一件事就是请求一些表。

Tests

三个套件针对真正的 Postgres 运行，没有 API 调用，也没有花费任何积分。 每个表都创建自己的表，为其添加行种子，然后将其删除。 它们故意针对已填充的表运行：空表上的 ALTER TYPE 不能证明任何事情。

npm test                  # all three, stopping at the first failure
npm run test:migrations   # or one at a time
npm run test:rows
npm run test:undo

test-migrations.ts 往返每个操作并检查架构返回的字节与其开始位置相同。 test-undo.ts 涵盖了在任何 SQL 运行之前拒绝的无序撤消、不再适合数据的反向操作以及撤消已撤消的操作。 第四个，npm run test:e2e，运行真实模型并消耗 API 积分；它被故意排除在 npm 测试之外。

Stack

Next.js 16（应用程序路由器）、TypeScript、Docker 中的 Postgres、Drizzle、Anthropic SDK、shadcn/ui。 没有浪链，故意的。

Drizzle 是查询和执行层，而不是迁移层：用户表是在运行时创建的，因此没有 TypeScript 模式文件描述它们，并且 drizzle-kit 无法区分它们。 Introspection 直接读取 information_schema 和 pg_catalog，因此它没有创建的类型不会被静默扁平化。

语音输入仅是通过浏览器的 Web Speech API 进行的听写。 文字记录填满文本区域，您仍然按“发送”。

Scope

四种模式操作：创建表、添加列、重命名列、更改列类型。 以及在 CRM 视图中撤消和编辑行。

对于表或列，没有删除：词汇表中不存在删除，而不是在检查后禁用。

没有关系。 当一个实体引用另一个实体时，模型使用普通整数列（animal_id），并在回复中表示没有任何强制执行。 该模式可以暗示它不强制执行的关系。

超出范围：身份验证、多租户、权限、RLS、生产部署、从其他 CRM 导入。 它是单用户且本地的。

建筑学

docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 记录每个目录和文件以及每个目录和文件存在的原因，包括为什么事务必须在单个签出连接上运行，以及为什么在提交后写入迁移文件。

执照

麻省理工学院，请参阅许可证。
